Apply Now — It's Free View Commission Rates
Commission Structure

More You Refer, More You Earn

Four performance tiers mean your commissions grow automatically as your referrals generate more revenue. No renegotiations required.

Tier Monthly Net Revenue Your Commission
Starter
$0 – $5,000 25%
Silver
$5,001 – $20,000 30%
Gold
$20,001 – $50,000 35%
Platinum
$50,001+ 40%

Commission calculated on net gaming revenue (deposits minus winnings). Rate and payout schedule confirmed individually during application review — automated payout tracking is rolling out per-partner. Settled monthly via bank transfer or crypto; PayPal available on request.

Process

Four Steps to Your First Payout

From application to commission in less than a week. We keep onboarding fast so you can start promoting immediately.

01
📋
Apply Online

Fill out our short application form. Tell us about your audience, traffic sources, and promotional methods.

Approved in 24–48 hrs
02
🔗
Get Your Links

Receive your unique tracking link and custom promo codes for your audience the moment you're approved.

Instant on approval
03
📣
Promote Your Way

Use your blog, YouTube channel, Twitch stream, social media, or email list — wherever your audience is.

Your channel, your rules
04
💰
Get Paid Weekly

Every Monday we pay out the previous week's earnings. PayPal, bank transfer, or crypto — you choose.

Every Monday
Partner Benefits

Everything You Need to Convert

We give you the tools, materials, and support to maximise your earnings from day one.

🔗
Unique Referral Links with UTM Tracking

Fully attributed tracking links so every click, signup, and deposit is tied directly to you — no revenue ever gets lost.

🎟️
Custom Promo Codes

Personalised bonus codes (e.g., YOURNAME50) your audience can use at signup — builds trust and boosts conversion rates.

📊
Real-Time Affiliate Dashboard

Live stats showing clicks, signups, first deposits, active players, and commissions earned — updated in real time.

🤝
Dedicated Affiliate Manager

A named contact available via email and chat to help you optimise campaigns, resolve issues, and plan strategy.

🖼️
Full Marketing Material Library

Banners in multiple sizes, game screenshots, video assets, email copy templates, and social media graphics — all ready to use.

🌐
Sub-Affiliate Program

Refer other affiliates to Matrix Spins and earn 5% of everything they generate — a passive income stream on top of your own commissions.

100
Games to Promote
Slots & more
14%
House Edge
We pay out well — players stay
$180
Avg Player LTV
Strong long-term value
90
Day Cookie Window
Tracked from first click
FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before you apply.

Commissions are paid every Monday for the previous week's net gaming revenue. Minimum payout threshold is $50. Payment methods available: PayPal, bank transfer, or crypto (Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT). If you haven't reached the $50 threshold, your balance rolls over to the following week.
We use 90-day last-click attribution. If someone clicks your link today and signs up any time in the next 90 days, that player is credited to you for their full lifetime with Matrix Spins. We also honour the first-touch if both conditions are met.
Yes — YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X (Twitter), Facebook, and others are all permitted, as long as you apply correct geo and age-targeting restrictions (18+, Australian audience only). Our affiliate manager can advise on compliant promotion guidelines for your specific platform.
No minimum traffic requirement. We welcome bloggers just starting out, niche content creators, and established publishers alike. What matters is audience quality and intent, not raw numbers. All applications are reviewed on a case-by-case basis.
You'll have access to a real-time affiliate dashboard showing clicks, signups, first deposits, active players, and commission earned — broken down by day, week, and month. You also receive a detailed weekly email report every Monday alongside your payment.
Get Started

Apply to Become a Partner

Takes 3 minutes. No setup fees, no minimums. We'll review your application and get back to you within 48 hours.

✓
Application opened in your email client

Your application should now be open as a pre-filled email to partners@msaart.online. Hit send when you're happy with it — we review every application individually and reply within 48 hours. If nothing opened, email partners@msaart.online directly with your site, traffic source, and monthly visitor count.

Please enter your full name.
Please enter a valid email address.
Please enter a valid URL (include https://).
Please select a traffic source.
Please select your monthly visitor range.
You must agree to the affiliate terms to proceed.

18+ only. Promote responsibly. Gambling can be addictive — always direct your audience to responsible gambling resources. Matrix Spins Casino operates at msaart.online.
